Table rules: Add missing using directives for Aspose.Words.Drawing, Aspose.Words.Tables, and Aspose.Words.Fields.
Loading rules: Keep the rest of the logic unchanged – loading documents, comparing, building a revisions report, and summarizing it.
Use the parameter‑less constructor of LoadOptions and set its LoadFormat property; there is no constructor that accepts a LoadFormat enum.
Saving/Export rules: Ensure the PdfSaveOptions object is correctly instantiated and assigned to the Save method.
If you need PDF/A‑2b specifically, upgrade Aspose.Words to a version that includes PdfCompliance.PdfA2b.
Save the comparison result to a DOCX file.
When creating HtmlSaveOptions for MHTML, pass SaveFormat.Mhtml to the constructor – this is the correct overload.
Layout rules: Add the missing namespace Aspose.Words.Notes for Footnote and FootnoteType.
Use the correct Run index when editing footnote text (Runs[0] instead of Runs[1]).
